commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair is queued because no discrete code defect remains; the protected maintainer label and intentional provider replay behavior need maintainer landing judgment.; Cleared: The diff only changes provider replay/runtime code and tests; it does not add dependencies, CI execution, secret handling, package metadata, or supply-chain surfaces. (sha=b7762167732321b497aaa8e5c45e83b62f7c6006)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds GitHub Copilot Claude replay sanitization in the provider hook and request-time Anthropic payload wrapper, with focused tests for text, thinking-only turns, tool calls, and continuation payloads.

PR surface: Source +119, Tests +96. Total +215 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked report gives a concrete second-turn Copilot Claude failure path, and current main source still preserves the latest assistant thinking block before provider-specific final sanitization.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is queued because no discrete code defect remains; the protected maintainer label and intentional provider replay behavior need maintainer landing judgment.

target.title: fix(copilot): drop thinking blocks from replay
target.body:
## Summary
- strip thinking blocks from GitHub Copilot Claude replay history instead of preserving the latest assistant reasoning turn
- apply the same Copilot Claude stripping rule to the request-time Anthropic stream payload wrapper used for tool continuations
- replace thinking-only Copilot Claude assistant replay payloads with a non-empty omitted-reasoning assistant text block so Anthropic turn shape remains valid
- keep the existing default latest-assistant preservation behavior for other providers/callers
- cover Copilot replay cases for text, thinking-only turns, tool calls, and request-time payload replay

Fixes #81520

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed:
GitHub Copilot Claude should not receive prior assistant `thinking` or `redacted_thinking` blocks when OpenClaw replays session history or sends a tool-continuation request payload, because Copilot rejects those replayed blocks.

Real environment tested:
WSL2 Ubuntu checkout at `/home/giodl/src/openclaw-85529`, PR head `0c647f5cade6026dedb72975d6cbbb57d80df3db`, source-level runtime payload harness through the real `wrapCopilotAnthropicStream` request wrapper, plus focused embedded-agent replay tests. Prior redacted live Copilot Claude proof exists on old head `f31f6c771a1` and still covers the same provider send path; this refresh only rebases on current main and changes thinking-only payload replay from dropping the assistant turn to preserving a neutral omitted-reasoning text turn.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/github-copilot/stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/thinking.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/provider-runtime.contract.test.ts --reporter=dot`
2. `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/github-copilot/stream.ts extensions/github-copilot/stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/replay-history.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/thinking.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/thinking.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts`
3. `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/github-copilot/stream.ts extensions/github-copilot/stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/replay-history.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/thinking.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/thinking.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts`
4. `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
5. `git diff --check`
6. `/home/giodl/.local/toolchains/node-v22.22.3-linux-x64/bin/codex review --base origin/main`

Evidence after fix:
Vitest output: 5 files passed, 115 tests passed on refreshed head. Formatter output: all matched files use the correct format. Oxlint output: found 0 warnings and 0 errors. Diff whitespace checks produced no output. Codex review found no discrete regression after the thinking-only payload shape fix. The `wrapCopilotAnthropicStream` regression tests capture the real outgoing Copilot Anthropic payload after `options.onPayload` and assert mixed assistant content is reduced to visible text while thinking-only assistant replay messages become `[assistant reasoning omitted]` text before tool-result continuation replay.

Observed result after fix:
The request-time Copilot Anthropic payload wrapper now removes both `thinking` and `redacted_thinking` assistant content before applying cache markers. A tool-continuation payload with a thinking-only assistant replay message keeps the assistant turn as a non-empty omitted-reasoning text message, while surrounding user and tool-result messages remain intact.

What was not tested:
A fresh live Copilot Claude run on rebased head `0c647f5cad` was not available in this WSL environment. Prior redacted live proof on `f31f6c771a1` showed an authenticated Copilot Claude request with `payloadContainsThinking: false` and a successful response on the same provider path.

## Validation
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/github-copilot/stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/thinking.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/provider-runtime.contract.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 5 files, 115 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/github-copilot/stream.ts extensions/github-copilot/stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/replay-history.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/thinking.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/thinking.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/github-copilot/stream.ts extensions/github-copilot/stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/replay-history.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/thinking.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/thinking.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `git diff --check`
- `git log --show-signature --format="%h %G? %s" origin/main..HEAD` -> both commits have good signatures
- `/home/giodl/.local/toolchains/node-v22.22.3-linux-x64/bin/codex review --base origin/main` -> no findings

No public config, plugin API, CLI flag, env var, migration, or plugin contract surface was added.

- replace thinking-only Copilot Claude assistant replay payloads with a non-empty omitted-reasoning assistant text block so Anthropic turn shape remains valid
- keep the existing default latest-assistant preservation behavior for other providers/callers
- cover Copilot replay cases for text, thinking-only turns, tool calls, and request-time payload replay

Fixes #81520

## Real behavior proof

Behavior or issue addressed:
GitHub Copilot Claude should not receive prior assistant `thinking` or `redacted_thinking` blocks when OpenClaw replays session history or sends a tool-continuation request payload, because Copilot rejects those replayed blocks.

Real environment tested:
WSL2 Ubuntu checkout at `/home/giodl/src/openclaw-85529`, PR head `0c647f5cade6026dedb72975d6cbbb57d80df3db`, source-level runtime payload harness through the real `wrapCopilotAnthropicStream` request wrapper, plus focused embedded-agent replay tests. Prior redacted live Copilot Claude proof exists on old head `f31f6c771a1` and still covers the same provider send path; this refresh only rebases on current main and changes thinking-only payload replay from dropping the assistant turn to preserving a neutral omitted-reasoning text turn.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/github-copilot/stream.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/thinking.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts extensions/github-copilot/provider-runtime.contract.test.ts --reporter=dot`

Evidence after fix:
Vitest output: 5 files passed, 115 tests passed on refreshed head. Formatter output: all matched files use the correct format. Oxlint output: found 0 warnings and 0 errors. Diff whitespace checks produced no output. Codex review found no discrete regression after the thinking-only payload shape fix. The `wrapCopilotAnthropicStream` regression tests capture the real outgoing Copilot Anthropic payload after `options.onPayload` and assert mixed assistant content is reduced to visible text while thinking-only assistant replay messages become `[assistant reasoning omitted]` text before tool-result continuation replay.

Observed result after fix:
The request-time Copilot Anthropic payload wrapper now removes both `thinking` and `redacted_thinking` assistant content before applying cache markers. A tool-continuation payload with a thinking-only assistant replay message keeps the assistant turn as a non-empty omitted-reasoning text message, while surrounding user and tool-result messages remain intact.

What was not tested:
A fresh live Copilot Claude run on rebased head `0c647f5cad` was not available in this WSL environment. Prior redacted live proof on `f31f6c771a1` showed an authenticated Copilot Claude request with `payloadContainsThinking: false` and a successful response on the same provider path.
